title: ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance Plan | In-Depth Review (Part 1)

description:
ICICI Lombard has introduced the Elevate Health Insurance Plan, a cutting-edge solution designed to meet diverse healthcare needs. This video (Part 1 of a 3-part series) provides a comprehensive breakdown of all the features and benefits, including unique offerings like Jumpstart, Infinite Care, Power Booster, Maternity Benefits, and more.

I take you through each term and condition in detail, helping you fully understand what this plan offers. By the end of this series, you'll have a clear understanding of whether the ICICI Lombard Elevate Plan suits your health insurance requirements.

For One 2 One Consultation: https://up4updates.my.canva.site/ramsingh

Time Stamp for Different Features:
0:00 - Introduction 
01:00 - Zonal Premium
2:53 - In Patient benefit (Room rent limit, ICU coverage)
4:14 - Day Care treatment 
5:12 - Modern treatment coverage 
5:28 - Pre & Post hospitalisation coverage
6:32 - AYUSH hospitalization coverage 
7:01 - Domestic road ambulance charges 
7:42 - Donor Expense Coverage 
8:50 - Domiciliary hospitalization coverage 
9:41 - Guaranteed community bonus (NCB)

Stay tuned for the next two parts, where we dive even deeper into the plan's features.

Make an informed decision about your health coverage today!
tags: ICICI Lombard Elevate health insurance plan review
ICICI Lombard Elevate terms and condition explained

comments.text:
WE WILL HAVE TO GIVE UNDERWRITNG FOR EVERY RENEWAL ABOUT OUR HEALTH CONDITIONS AND ICICI CAN REJECT RENEWAL  OR CAN INCREASE PREMIUM OR REJECT A CLAIM ON THE BASIS OF THIS. THIS IS THE BIGGEST DRAW BACK. NO OTHER COMPANY ASKS FOR AN UNDERWRITING
THE RESTORATION BENEFIT IS NOT ACTIVATED IN FIRST CLAIM. THEN WHAT IS THE USE OF IT
comments.author: @vimarsakan1

comments.text: Insurance कंपनियों की इतनी ज्यादा नियत खराब रहती है ये किसी ने नहीं सोचा होगा , insurance कंपनियों के काम करने के तरीके से सिर्फ एक ही मैसेज जाता है और वो ये कि कंपनियां सिर्फ और सिर्फ लोगों को अपने जाल में फंसाकर लोगों से पैसे ऐंठना चाहती है।
comments.author: @All_Is_Well-v5v

comments.text:
लेकिन एक टाइम बाद ICICI बैंक add on का charge इतना बढ़ा देगी कि वो आप afford नहीं कर पाओगे और फिर जिस भी renewal पर आपने उस particular add on का premium नहीं भरा तो सब कुछ Zero हो जाएगा।👎
फिर आपकी सारी मेहनत बेकार , आपने इतने सालों तक बेनिफिट्स के चक्कर में add on का जितना भी प्रीमियम भरा वो भी बेकार।

सिर्फ पछताने के सिवाय हाथ में कुछ नहीं रहेगा फिर आप सोचोगे अब मैं कोई और कंपनी में पॉलिसी Port करा लेता हूँ। कंपनी शुरू में लालच देती है ताकि customer को product बेचा जा सके, और एक बार जब आप फंसे फिर कंपनी कस्टमर को अपने हिसाब से नाच नचाती है और यदि आप कंपनी के हिसाब से नहीं चले तो आपकी पूरी पॉलिसी आपके किसी काम की नहीं रहेगी।
comments.author: @All_Is_Well-v5v

comments.text: I want to take icici elevate for self. I live in west bengal (zone C), but I want to take treatment from Kolkata hospitals ( zone B), which should I apply zone B or Zone C. Because my aadhar address is of Zone C

comments.text:
Apply for zone B.
 icici elevate plan has a co-payment if you take treatment in the higher zone, then your policy Zone.


Also you can connect with me for one to one session to understand this policy in more detail
